name: lurar-appcast-counter
description: Privacy-friendly active-install heartbeat for Lurar (Cloudflare Worker on lurar.app/appcast.xml).

scripts.stats: wrangler d1 execute lurar-metrics --remote --command "SELECT day, SUM(hits) AS hits FROM appcast_hits GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 30"
scripts.stats:country: wrangler d1 execute lurar-metrics --remote --command "SELECT day, country, hits FROM appcast_hits ORDER BY day DESC, hits DESC LIMIT 60"
